text.div:
Generated Narrative: CodeSystem cr-encounter-type

This case-sensitive code system https://dhis2.org/fhir/cancer-registry/CodeSystem/cr-encounter-type defines the following codes:

CodeDisplayDefinition
tumor Tumor RegistrationEncounter capturing clinical and epidemiological data for a single registered tumour (DHIS2 Tumor stage).
source Source NotificationEncounter recording a documentation source that notified the registry about a cancer case (DHIS2 Source stage).
follow-up Follow-up ContactEncounter recording a follow-up contact with the registered patient to ascertain vital status (DHIS2 Follow-up stage).

name: CREncounterTypeCS
title: Cancer Registry Encounter Types
description: Encounter types representing the three repeatable program stages of the DHIS2 Cancer Registry tracker program.

concept.definition: Encounter capturing clinical and epidemiological data for a single registered tumour (DHIS2 Tumor stage).
Encounter recording a documentation source that notified the registry about a cancer case (DHIS2 Source stage).
Encounter recording a follow-up contact with the registered patient to ascertain vital status (DHIS2 Follow-up stage).
